name: HandoffCycle
description:
Library component. Models `gt handoff --cycle` (internal/cmd/handoff.go:455-591), the substrate command that does session succession. Triggered by a PreCompact hook firing the cycle command as a subprocess. The two ordered substrate actions modeled here are: persist handoff mail, then respawn the tmux pane. The pane respawn atomically kills the current agent and starts a fresh one; the new agent's SessionStart hook reads the mail to resume.

The ordering matters for correctness: mail must be persisted BEFORE the pane respawn (else the new agent boots with no work). The real code makes mail-persist fatal-on-error (handoff.go:515-526) for exactly this reason -- silent failure would leave the next session with an empty hook.

Elided from this cut: the handoff marker file (handoff.go:533-541). The marker is an optimization signal that lets gt prime --hook take a lighter resume path (runPrimeCompactResume) instead of a full setupPrimeSession; both paths read the same mail. The marker is not a correctness gate, so we omit it for spec clarity.

TRIGGER.description: Cycle command invoked. Real: hook config registers `gt handoff --cycle --reason compaction` as the PreCompact handler; tmux runs it as a subprocess.

SAVE_MAIL.description: Persist handoff mail to beads. Real: sendHandoffMail (handoff.go:515) -- auto-hooked for successor; fatal on failure.

MAILBOX_OBSERVE.description: Observe the Mailbox state to confirm mail has actually been persisted before requesting the pane respawn. Real: sendHandoffMail is a synchronous call that returns success only AFTER persistence (handoff.go:515-526); we model that synchrony as an observe-guard.

RESPAWN_PANE.description: Tell the tmux pane to kill the current process and start a fresh one. Real: t.RespawnPane (handoff.go:591) -- atomic kill+start.

actors.name: HandoffCycle
actors.owner: Substrate session-succession driver. Three observable transitions per cycle: trigger (run as subprocess), save mail, request respawn.

triples.event: agent's PreCompact handler invokes the cycle command
send handoff mail (auto-collect state into a self-addressed bead)
wait for Mailbox to confirm Persisted (sendHandoffMail returns success)
request tmux pane respawn (atomic kill+start fresh)
terminal: cycle command exits after RespawnPane returns
